revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十六]][[zh:八月十六]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 16|qq=August 16}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Jingo-keiun|en|Jingo-keiun|qid=Q1373049|lt=Jingō-keiun|1=Jingo-keiun}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|767|en|767|qid=Q409960|lt=767|1=767}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}}) – By the auspicious appearance of clouds, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|qid=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō Shingu|1=Tenpyō-jingo}} to {{ill|Jingo-keiun|en|Jingo-keiun|qid=Q1373049|lt=Jingō-keiun|1=Jingo-keiun}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * {{ill|Kyūju|en|Kyūju|qid=Q1194205|lt=Kyūju|1=Kyūju}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1155|en|1155|qid=Q19650|lt=1155|1=1155}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}}) – The younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitomo|en|Minamoto no Yoshitomo|qid=Q532301|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshikata|ja|源義賢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshikata|1=Minamoto no Yoshikata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11564279}}, was killed during an attack on the eldest son, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshihira|en|Minamoto no Yoshihira|qid=Q988170|lt=Minamoto no Yoshihira|1=Minamoto no Yoshihira}}, during the {{ill|Ōkura War|ja|大蔵合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura War|1=Q11438716|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11438716}}. Yoshikata’s son, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|en|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qid=Q1139202|lt=Minamoto no Yoshinaka|1=Minamoto no Yoshinaka}}, fled to Kiso. * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|qid=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō|1=Eikyō}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1438|en|1438|qid=Q6377|lt=1438|1=1438}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}}) – During the {{ill|Eikyō Rebellion|ja|永享の乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eikyō Rebellion|1=Eikyō War|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11131079}}, Kamakura Kubō {{ill|Ashikaga Mochiuji|en|Ashikaga Mochiuji|qid=Q4805073|lt=Ashikaga Mochishi|1=Ashikaga Mochiuji}} marched out in response to an attack by Kanto Kanrei {{ill|Uesugi Norizane|en|Uesugi Norizane|qid=Q674269|lt=Uesugi Norimitsu|1=Uesugi Norizane}}. == Births == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1622|en|1622|qid=Q6815|lt=1622|1=1622}} {{ill|September 21|en|September 21|qid=Q2891|lt=September 21|1=September 21}}) – {{ill|Yamaga Sokō|en|Yamaga Sokō|qid=Q1095270|lt=Yamaga Sokō|1=Yamaga Sokō}}, a {{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died {{ill|1685|en|1685|qid=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}}). * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1680|en|1680|qid=Q7642|lt=1680|1=1680}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}}) – {{ill|Kyougoku-no-miya Fuminori Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyougoku-no-miya Fuminori Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10883186}}, a member of the {{ill|Imperial Family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11581068}} of {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}} (died {{ill|1711|en|1711|qid=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōwa (Heian period)|en|Kōwa (Heian period)|qid=Q1193890|lt=Kōwa|1=Kōwa (Heian period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1099|en|1099|qid=Q19496|lt=1099|1=1099}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q29972024}}, a {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} (born {{ill|1047|en|1047|qid=Q19357|lt=1047|1=1047}}). * {{ill|Kyūju|en|Kyūju|qid=Q1194205|lt=Kyūju|1=Kyūju}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1155|en|1155|qid=Q19650|lt=1155|1=1155}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshikata|ja|源義賢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshikata|1=Minamoto no Yoshikata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11564279}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|ja|正暁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1069086}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|qid=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|qid=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}}) – {{ill|Prince Morikuni|en|Prince Morikuni|qid=Q552852|lt=Morikuni Shinnō|1=Prince Morikuni}}, 9th-generation {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (born {{ill|1301|en|1301|qid=Q5610|lt=1301|1=1301}}). * {{ill|Ryakuō|ja|略応|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryakuō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year / {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|qid=Q1194159|lt=Engen|1=Engen}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1339|en|1339|qid=Q6051|lt=1339|1=1339}} {{ill|September 19|en|September 19|qid=Q2896|lt=September 19|1=September 19}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}}, the 96th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1288|en|1288|qid=Q5550|lt=1288|1=1288}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|qid=Q2913|lt=October 1|1=October 1}}) – {{ill|Kawai Tsugunosuke|en|Kawai Tsugunosuke|qid=Q2575270|lt=Kawai Tsuginosuke|1=Kawai Tsugunosuke}}, a retainer and head retainer of the {{ill|Nagaoka Domain|ja|長岡藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Domain|1=Q1206968|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1206968}} of {{ill|Echigo|ja|越後|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 越後国|1=Echigo Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q666514}} (born {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}}). == Fictional Events == === Deaths === * 年不明 – {{ill|Yūgao|ja|夕顔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yūgao|1=Q6584444|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6584444}}, a character from {{ill|The Tale of Genji|en|The Tale of Genji|qid=Q8269|lt=The Tale of Genji|1=The Tale of Genji}}.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|15|8|17|7|16|9|8|0816|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
